tests.scenario: Trial option visible at subscription prompt
steps: Open app as a new unauthenticated user
Tap any premium content item
Observe the subscription prompt
tests.expected_result: A free or discounted trial option is visible without requiring payment details.

tests.scenario: Premium content accessible after trial activation
steps: Activate the free trial from the subscription prompt
Browse the content library
tests.expected_result: At least one previously locked premium item is now playable.

tests.scenario: Short session content visible on home screen
steps: Log in and navigate to the home screen
Check for content items labelled 5 minutes or under
tests.expected_result: At least one item of 5 minutes or fewer is visible without scrolling.

tests.scenario: Short session plays without leaving home screen
steps: Log in and navigate to the home screen
Tap a short session item
tests.expected_result: Playback starts inline or as an overlay without navigating away from the home screen.

tests.scenario: Keyword search returns relevant results within 2 seconds
steps: Tap the search bar
Enter 'rain sounds' and submit
Start a timer on submission
tests.expected_result: Results appear within 2 seconds and at least one top-5 result matches the query.

tests.scenario: Natural language search returns relevant results
steps: Tap the search bar
Enter 'help me calm down when anxious' and submit
Review the top 5 results
tests.expected_result: At least one result is a breathing exercise or anxiety relief content item.

tests.scenario: Recently Played section visible on home screen
steps: Log in as a returning user with prior playback history
Navigate to the home screen
tests.expected_result: A Recently Played section is visible above the fold with at least one item.

tests.scenario: Previously played content starts within 3 taps
steps: Log in and go to the home screen
Tap the most recent item in Recently Played
Count taps to playback start
tests.expected_result: Playback begins in 3 taps or fewer with no upsell or loading gate in between.

tests.scenario: Premium content preview shown without account creation
steps: Open app without logging in
Tap a premium content item
tests.expected_result: Title, description, and a preview are shown with no registration wall triggered.

tests.scenario: No registration wall before preview on multiple items
steps: Open app unauthenticated
Tap 5 different premium items in sequence
tests.expected_result: Title and description load for all 5 items before any login prompt appears.

tests.scenario: 5 free items playable without an account
steps: Open app and decline account creation
Play 5 distinct free content items
tests.expected_result: All 5 items play to completion with no registration prompt.

tests.scenario: No registration prompt interrupts free content playback
steps: Open app unauthenticated
Play a free content item to completion
tests.expected_result: No login modal or account creation prompt appears during playback.

tests.scenario: No ads shown during premium subscriber session
steps: Log in as an active premium subscriber
Navigate 5 screens and play 3 content items in full
tests.expected_result: Zero banner, interstitial, or audio ads appear throughout the session.

tests.scenario: No ads shown for premium subscriber on tablet
steps: Log in as an active premium subscriber on a tablet
Navigate and play content for a full session
tests.expected_result: No ads of any kind are displayed on the tablet device.

tests.scenario: App layout renders correctly on tablet
steps: Launch the app on a supported tablet
Navigate the home screen, library, and a content detail page
tests.expected_result: No overlapping, clipped, or misaligned UI elements on any screen.

tests.scenario: Playback stable across 20 consecutive sessions on tablet
steps: Launch the app on a supported tablet
Play a content item to completion 20 times consecutively
tests.expected_result: All 20 sessions complete without a crash or freeze.

tests.scenario: Human-readable error shown on update-related launch failure
steps: Simulate a post-update launch failure in a test environment
Attempt to launch the app
tests.expected_result: A clear error message is shown instead of a blank or frozen screen.

tests.scenario: Recovery action offered after launch failure
steps: Simulate a post-update launch failure
Observe the error screen
tests.expected_result: At least one actionable recovery option (e.g. Repair, Clear Cache) is displayed.

tests.scenario: Billing dispute receives first response within 24 hours
steps: Submit a billing dispute via in-app support and record the timestamp
Monitor for a support response
tests.expected_result: A substantive response is received within 24 hours of submission.

tests.scenario: Follow-up contact requires no repeated information
steps: Submit a billing dispute with full details
Send a follow-up message referencing the same issue
tests.expected_result: Support does not request information already provided in the original submission.

tests.scenario: Billing history shows all required charge fields
steps: Log in as a user with at least 3 historical charges
Navigate to billing settings and open billing history
tests.expected_result: Each entry shows date, amount, currency, and plan name for all charges in the past 24 months.

tests.scenario: Billing history reachable within 3 taps
steps: Log in and go to account home
Navigate to billing history and count taps
tests.expected_result: Billing history is reached in 3 taps or fewer with no interstitials.

tests.scenario: Cancel and refund options accessible without contacting support
steps: Log in as an active subscriber
Open account settings and locate cancellation and refund options
tests.expected_result: Both options are usable without opening a support chat or external page.

tests.scenario: Cancellation produces confirmation and email within 5 minutes
steps: Log in as an active subscriber
Complete the self-service cancellation flow
Check for on-screen confirmation and monitor email
tests.expected_result: On-screen confirmation appears immediately and a confirmation email arrives within 5 minutes.
